item.cobblemon.destiny_knot.tooltip: When held by a parent while breeding, passes down 5 of the two parents' combined IVs at random
item.cobblemon.everstone.tooltip: Prevents the holder from evolving, and passes its Nature to the offspring when bred
item.cobblemon.pomeg_berry.tooltip_2: Poké Rod bait: attracts HP EV yields

item.cobblemon.tamato_berry.tooltip_2: Poké Rod bait: attracts Speed EV yields
item.cobblemon.big_root.tooltip: Increases the HP the holder recovers from draining moves and Leech Seed
item.cobblemon.clear_amulet.tooltip: Prevents the holder's stats from being lowered by opponents
item.cobblemon.grip_claw.tooltip: Extends the holder's trapping moves to last seven turns
item.cobblemon.lagging_tail.tooltip: Forces the holder to always act last in its priority bracket
item.cobblemon.luminous_moss.tooltip_1: Raises the holder's Sp. Def when hit by a Water-type move
